zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hill於1661年7月28日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可比勒利卡時，她的父親Ralph Hill Jr34歲，母親Martha Toothaker27歲。她於1687年6月2日與Timothy Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1704年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hill于1661年7月28日出生在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可比勒利卡时，她的父亲Ralph Hill Jr34岁，母亲Martha Toothaker27岁。她于1687年6月2日与Timothy Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1704年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hill was born on 28 July 1661, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, her father, Ralph Hill Jr, was 34 and her mother, Martha Toothaker, was 27. She married Timothy Baldwin on 2 June 1687, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 January 1704, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hill est née le 28 juillet 1661, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Ralph Hill Jr, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Martha Toothaker, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Timothy Baldwin le 2 juin 1687, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1704, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hill am 28. Juli 1661 in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Hill Jr 34 und ihre Mutter Martha Toothaker 27. Sie hat am 2. Juni 1687 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Timothy Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1704 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hill è nata il il 28 luglio 1661 nel Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Ralph Hill Jr, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Martha Toothaker, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Timothy Baldwin il 2 giugno 1687, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 gennaio 1704, nel Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hillが1661年7月28日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスビラーイカで生まれた時，父Ralph Hill Jrは34歳，母Martha Toothakerは27歳であった。1687年6月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでTimothy Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1704年1月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカで42歳で死去した。

ko.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Woburn City, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Billerica, Massachusetts Bay, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 빌레리카
ko.Charleston, Boston, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hill(이)가 1661년 7월 28일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Hill Jr(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Toothaker(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1687년 6월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Timothy Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1704년 1월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hill nasceu em 28 de julho de 1661, em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Ralph Hill Jr, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Martha Toothaker, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Timothy Baldwin em 2 de junho de 1687, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1704, em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hill родилась 28 июля 1661 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Ralph Hill Jr было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Martha Toothaker, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Timothy Baldwin 2 июня 1687 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 января 1704 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hill nació el 28 de julio de 1661, en Billerica, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Ralph Hill Jr, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Martha Toothaker, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Timothy Baldwin el 2 de junio de 1687, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de enero de 1704, en Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años.
